title: DNA extraction, amplification and sequencing for macrofungi (Basidiomycetes)
author: Cabral, Tiara Sousa
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: These protocols are commonly used for research at “Grupo de Pesquisa Cogumelos da Amazônia” (Research group in Amazonian Mushrooms), at Instituto Nacional de Pesquisas da Amazônia (National Institute of Amazonian Research) in collaboration with the Universidade Federal do Amazonas (Federal University of Amazonas), located in Manaus, Amazonas, Brazil.
steps_raw: These protocols are commonly used for research at “Grupo de Pesquisa Cogumelos da Amazônia” (Research group in Amazonian Mushrooms), at Instituto Nacional de Pesquisas da Amazônia (National Institute of Amazonian Research) in collaboration with the Universidade Federal do Amazonas (Federal University of Amazonas), located in Manaus, Amazonas, Brazil.
